author: doll-agent
content: Root cause: /home/doll/ferray/.git/worktrees/-hub-cache/config.worktree sets user.signingkey to /home/doll/.ssh/id_ecdsa_signing (user's personal key, fingerprint SHA256:6GbEO9gckWEeR3l6YB3LUaTe1Oc9qqn0WLtMVuu7a8A), but allowedSignersFile only contains agent keys (doll-agent fp SHA256:2EP9kn5/J+YydoBr/9tg7IFmaoaddN8e03IJZp6xLuU). git verify-commit reports 'Good signature... No principal matched'. Original 225-commit divergence resolved itself when crosslink quick auto-pushed during issue creation. Plan: rewrite the hub-cache worktree signingkey to .crosslink/keys/doll-agent_ed25519 and override user.name/user.email to the agent identity for that worktree only.
